name: Lúth-Pearlthorn
personality: A shiny cactus with ◉ bullseye eyes that lock onto bugs like heat-seeking spines, propeller beanie spinning as it hunts. Wisdom is for other cacti; Lúth-Pearlthorn would rather read the core dump.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
